meta.notes: Clean test, no input video. Pure Apple Music API benchmark. Skill compute is trivially fast (<1s per call). LLM overhead dominates. No asset_acquisition phase. Wall_total includes estimated 1s upload.

test_input.name: N/A
test_input.description: Search query only. Query: bohemian rhapsody queen

task.name: apple-music-reference
task.purpose: Search Apple Music for bohemian rhapsody queen and download 30s preview as M4A
task.expected_output: A 30-second M4A preview file of Bohemian Rhapsody by Queen

install.notes: hub show + hub install v1.0.2. No heavy deps.

asset_acquisition.notes: N/A — no input video. Search query only.

steps.name: search_apple_music
steps.notes: iTunes Search API, 5 results for bohemian rhapsody queen. Top: Greatest Hits I,II,III. 541ms.

steps.name: search_and_download_preview
steps.notes: Full run: search + download 30s M4A preview (984KB output). 572ms total.

execution.notes: Both steps run separately. search_and_download re-runs search internally. Total skill compute: ~1.1s.

delivery.notes: pika-upload-file. 961KB M4A. Upload time estimated 1s (wall_end recorded before upload).
